== Notes for [[Item:Q89613|Q89613]] ==

•ID: I84738

•Name: M. Pupienus Africanus

•Given Name: M. Pupienus

•Surname: Africanus

•Sex: M

•_UID: 5B075DAC20D19E49B9D4E45EA02DDB68220A

•Change Date: 11 Aug 2005

•Birth: ABT 200

•Death: 236

Marriage 1 Cornelia Marcellina b: ABT 205

•Married:

Children

1. Pupiena Sextia Paulina Cethegilla b: ABT 225

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I84738

-----------------------------------------

Marcus Pupienus Africanus Maximus

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Jump to: navigation, search

Marcus Pupienus Africanus Maximus (c. 200 – aft. 236) was a Roman politician.

He was the son of Pupienus, later Emperor, and wife Sextia Cethegilla.[citation needed]

He was Consul Ordinarius in 236 joint with Emperor Maximinus I (Thrax).

He married Cornelia Marullina, born c. 205, daughter of Lucius Cornelius Cossonius Scipio Salvidius Orfitus and wife, and had two children: Pupiena Sextia Paulina Cethegilla, born c. 225 and named after her paternal aunt, who married Marcus Maecius Probus, and Publius Pupienus Maximus.

Forrás / Source:

http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marcus_Pupienus_Africanus_Maximus

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
